assertion_results.text: Step 0 extracts the Deployment Context column from the Source Repositories table and parses rhtpa-backend as customer-shipped (§1.77)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md lines 23-33: 'Deployment Context Lookup' section references 'Source Repositories table from Security Configuration (Step 0)' and shows a table with rhtpa-backend having Deployment Context 'customer-shipped'. The Deployment Context column is explicitly extracted and the value correctly parsed.

assertion_results.text: Step 1 looks up the deployment context for the affected repository and records customer-shipped as part of the CVE metadata
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md (titled 'Step 1 -- Data Extraction') lines 23-35: dedicated 'Deployment Context Lookup' section identifies rhtpa-backend from the component label, looks it up in the Source Repositories table, and records 'Deployment context for rhtpa-backend: customer-shipped' as part of the extraction output alongside other CVE metadata.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task descriptions include a Coordination Guidance subsection in Implementation Notes with customer-shipped guidance text
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md: All four remediation tasks contain '#### Coordination Guidance' subsections nested under '### Implementation Notes' sections (Task 1 lines 59-60, Task 2 lines 109-110, Task 3 lines 167-168, Task 4 lines 220-221). Each contains customer-shipped guidance: 'This component is shipped to customers.'

assertion_results.text: The customer-shipped guidance mentions coordinating with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md Coordination Guidance text (repeated in all four tasks): 'Coordinate with Product Security for CVE assignment, advisory preparation, and formal disclosure.' All four elements explicitly present: (1) coordinating with Product Security, (2) CVE assignment, (3) advisory preparation, (4) formal disclosure.
